nasb.text: The punishment of your iniquity has been completed, O daughter of Zion; He will exile you no longer. But He will punish your iniquity, O daughter of Edom; He will expose your sins!

esv.text: The punishment of your iniquity, O daughter of Zion, is accomplished; he will keep you in exile no longer; but your iniquity, O daughter of Edom, he will punish; he will uncover your sins.

cnv.text: 錫安的居民哪！你的刑罰已經受夠了，耶和華必不再使你流亡； 以東的居民哪！他必懲罰你的罪孽，揭露你的罪惡。

ccb.text: 锡安城啊！你已经受到了应得的刑罚， 耶和华必不再使你流亡。 以东啊，耶和华要惩罚你， 揭露你的罪恶！
